client_psychology: Clients form deep emotional bonds with their hair stylist — many stay for years or decades. Hair is identity. A bad color job or cut is visible to everyone they interact with, so trust is earned slowly. Before/after photos are everything for attracting new clients. Clients value a stylist who LISTENS to what they want vs. pushes their own vision. Education about hair health builds trust and opens doors for product sales and premium services.
